args.command:
config firewall address
edit "compromised-ubuntu"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_ICMP_from_192.168.1.3"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "compromised-ubuntu"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end
show firewall address "compromised-ubuntu"
show firewall policy | grep -n "Block_ICMP_from_192.168.1.3" -n || show firewall policy
